programme.title: Burn Pile Murder Trial
programme.desc: According to prosecutors in their opening statements, money was the motive for this murder. Next, Melody Farris' defense delivered their opening remarks to the jury. They claimed police acted on confirmation bias when they allegedly narrowed erroneously on the defendant for the death of her husband, Gary. A complicated family coupled with a complicated police investigation all led to fingers pointing at Melody Farris for first-degree murder.

programme.title: Serymar Soto
programme.desc: "The series, hosted by Univision news anchor Ilia Calderón, revisits harrowing cases that shocked the public. Through the accounts of victims' families, expert analysis, and journalists, the show unravels the contributing factors and warning signs that ultimately led to each tragic event. With access to personal images, videos, and locations related to the victims and their perpetrators, viewers are taken on a journey into the heart-wrenching stories."

programme.title: MeatEater - Crossing Borders: Mexican Bison
programme.desc: Steven Rinella heads into the mountains of the Sonora Desert on a true, wild, free-ranging bison hunt.

programme.title: MeatEater - Strange Hunt in a Strange Land: New Zealand Red Stag
programme.desc: Steven Rinella is on New Zealand's South Island for a do-it-yourself, free-range hunt for the majestic red stag. But first, he needs to secure some camp meat in the form of wild lamb. Battling weather and wary game in mountainous terrain, he uses his spot-and-stalk hunting skills to discover Kiwi red stags are a trophy worthy of the wall and the cook pot.

programme.title: MeatEater - Bush Pig: New Zealand Wild Boar
programme.desc: Steven Rinella and local pig hunting expert, Darren Moore, spend a wild, action-packed day tracking down Captain Cook boars in the thick New Zealand bush. Their tools for the job include two tough little pig dogs, a knife, and some real grit. Wild pigs are dangerous critters and this is as visceral as a hunt gets. Along the way, Steve learns a new technique for field-prepping whole hogs.

programme.title: MeatEater - The Top of the Bottom of the World: New Zealand Thar Part 1
programme.desc: With the help of guide and friend Remi Warren, Steven Rinella gears up for a massive climb into New Zealand's Southern Alps in pursuit of Chamois and Tahr. The hunters will travel light and base out of an alpine hut to find animals Steve has never hunted. Things turns adventurous quickly; with an impassable glacial river between Steve and his goal. But with hard work, Steve experiences a do-it-yourself high country hunt like no other.

programme.title: MeatEater - The Top of the Bottom of the World: New Zealand Thar Part 2
programme.desc: With the help of guide and friend Remi Warren, Steven Rinella gears up for a massive climb into New Zealand's Southern Alps in pursuit of Chamois and Tahr. The hunters will travel light and base out of an alpine hut to find animals Steve has never hunted. Things turns adventurous quickly; with an impassable glacial river between Steve and his goal. But with hard work, Steve experiences a do-it-yourself high country hunt like no other.

programme.title: MeatEater - Cooking Special: Giving Thanks
programme.desc: The Pilgrims didn't get their turkey at the store and neither does Steven Rinella. On this special Holiday episode Steve cooks three enticing dishes: Wild Turkey Galantine, Smoked Black Bear Ham, and his take on the traditional Mincemeat Pie. Appetites will run large as Steve makes a special meal for his family and friends.

programme.title: MeatEater - True North: Alaska North Slope Caribou
programme.desc: Steven Rinella and special guest, the author Tim Ferriss, travel to the remote north slope of Alaska.

programme.title: MeatEater - The Greatest Draw: Alaska Dall Sheep Part 1
programme.desc: After drawing one of the most coveted big game tags in North America, a Tok Management Area Dall sheep tag, Steven Rinella heads out for a truly rare and epic Alaskan experience. Along with his brother Danny and friend Paul, Steve is dropped deep into the Alaska Range. After a rugged hike through nasty weather, Steve's skills and fortitude are tested against his elusive, high-climbing quarry.

programme.title: MeatEater - The Greatest Draw: Alaska Dall Sheep Part 2
programme.desc: After drawing one of the most coveted big game tags in North America a Tok Management Area Dall sheep tag Steven Rinella heads out for a truly rare and epic Alaskan experience. Along with his brother Danny and friend Paul, Steve is dropped deep into the Alaska Range. After a rugged hike through nasty weather, Steve's skills and fortitude are tested against his elusive, high-climbing quarry.

programme.title: MeatEater - Sonoran Super-Birds: Mexico Gould's Turkey
programme.desc: Steven Rinella crosses the border into Mexico's desert to call in the Gould's wild turkey. Of the five turkey subspecies in North America, the Gould's is the largest but rarest. On this unique Mexican adventure, Steve finds exciting action for gobbling toms. With locally made charcoal at his disposal, he'll grill up a big, brined, delicious bird.

programme.title: MeatEater - Straight Flush: Montana Mountain Grouse
programme.desc: Steven Rinella and his friend Ronny Boehme drive into the mountains of southwest Montana to hunt the high ridge tops for dusky grouse. Ronny's Bracco Italiano hunting dogs have been bred and trained for this work, but can Ronny handle the altitude? The duo prepares dusky grouse jalape√±o poppers and grouse fettuccine with a white wine and cream sauce.

programme.title: MeatEater - Meet the Meateaters: Montana Crew Muley Part 1
programme.desc: The goal on MeatEater has always been to make viewers feel like they're on a hunt with Steven Rinella, but on this two-part episode Rinella grants his viewers an all-access pass to see just how the MeatEater crew works together to make the show. Strap-in for some behind-the-scenes action.

programme.title: MeatEater - Meet the Meateaters: Montana Crew Muley Part 2
programme.desc: The goal on MeatEater has always been to make viewers feel like theyre on a hunt with Steven Rinella, but.

programme.title: MeatEater - First Timers: Montana Mule Deer Part 1
programme.desc: Television personality Joe Rogan and his best friend, comedian Bryan Callen, join Steven Rinella for their very first hunt. On a float trip for mule deer through the rugged Missouri Breaks, this is as adventurous of a first hunt as anyone could hope for, and Steve's special guests are in for a memorable experience and delicious wild game field cooking in some gorgeous country.

programme.title: MeatEater - First Timers: Montana Mule Deer Part 2
programme.desc: Television personality Joe Rogan and his best friend, comedian Bryan Callen, join Steven Rinella for their very first hunt. On a float trip for mule deer through the rugged Missouri Breaks, this is as adventurous of a first hunt as anyone could hope for, and Steve's special guests are in for a memorable experience and delicious wild game field cooking in some gorgeous country.

programme.title: MeatEater - Swamp Stew: Michigan Bowfishing
programme.desc: Steven Rinella returns to his cherished boyhood stomping grounds along Michigans Muskegon River.

programme.title: MeatEater - The Wide Open: New Mexico Antelope
programme.desc: Steven Rinella and friend Cody Lujan head to Northeastern New Mexico to hunt pronghorn antelope, the fastest big game animal in the United States. In the wide open desert plains, Steve will have to work hard to stalk within range of a mature buck. The payoff will be antelope loin topped with local New Mexico chiles.

programme.title: MeatEater - Primal Cuts: Bone-in Cooking Special
programme.desc: In this cooking special, Steven Rinella shows his fans some of his favorite preparations for big, bone-in cuts of red meat. Interspersed with highlights from his recent caribou, buffalo, and mule deer hunts, the show features recipes that utilize some of the most underappreciated parts of big game animals. This episode is an attractive and delicious tribute to Steve's gun-to-table ethic.

programme.title: MeatEater - El Venado Blanco: Mexico Coues Deer
programme.desc: Steven Rinella returns to his favorite hunting grounds of Sonora, Mexico to hunt for a Coues deer buck during the peak rutting season. Steve sets up camp and spends days glassing mountains and canyons for these elusive, wary desert whitetails. Meanwhile, his hunting partner, Remi Warren, attempts the difficult task of stalking one with a bow. To cap off the hunt, Steve cooks a batch of venison ribs braised in a Dutch oven buried beneath hot coals.

programme.title: MeatEater - Clash of the Titans: Northern California Pig & Deer
programme.desc: In this episode, Steven Rinella joins forces with fellow hunter and wild game chef Hank Shaw in the hills of Central California to go after Columbia blacktail deer, wild pigs, and a handful of small game species that are in season. The end result is a culinary smorgasbord of epic proportions.

programme.title: Capítulo 183
programme.desc: Giovanni openly accepts his parents and his love for Vico in front of the entire school. Roberta wrecks on Simon's motorcycle. Miguel decides to finish with his revenge then return to Monterrey. Franco gets injured and Alma leaves him by himself. Mía has dance rehearsals; Gastón gets angry when she dances with Miguel. Tomás decides to stay with Pilar to get good grades. Gastón punishes Miguel.

programme.title: Rebelde
programme.desc: Six teenagers with different lives and personalities attend a prominent private school with only one thing in common: their vocation and passion for music.

programme.title: Capítulo 185
programme.desc: Gastón punishes the students. Roberta devises a long con to get revenge on Diego. Valeria throws a fit when she learns that Mía will get her party; Franco admonishes her. Mía promises Gastón she'll stay away from Miguel. Franco begs Miguel for help with protecting Mía. Lupita tells Galia who stole the tests. Gandia withdraws his helping hand to Tomás. Gastón begins an investigation into Miguel. Pilar attacks Lupita.

programme.title: Capítulo 186
programme.desc: Valeria accuses Alma of trying to take Franco. Celina teams up with Pilar to get revenge on Lupita. Simon snaps an unflattering picture of Diego, Giovanni, and Tomás; copies are made anonymously. Celina scratches out Lupita's name on Mía's guest list. Miguel follows Gastón to a bank where he exits handcuffed to a briefcase. Roberta beats up Pilar to defend Lupita and blames her for the photo. Miguel and Mía partner up in class; he tells her to ask Gastón about his morning.

programme.title: Capítulo 187
programme.desc: Mía asks Gastón where he went, he tells her but then reveals he has a plan to get rid of Miguel. Mendiola congratulates Gandia then suspends Pilar for a week. Pilar tells Celina they have to make Lupita leave. Simon and Diego fight. Miguel updates Franco in return he put him in charge of Mía's party details. Lupita catches Celina vomiting. Gastón continues his investigation into Miguel. When Diego finds out Roberta is dating Simon, he tells her he loves her and kisses her. Madariaga continues to push Hilda and Hilario together. Gastón decides to leave for "Monterrey. Mía finds the letter to Lupita.

programme.title: Rebelde
programme.desc: Six teenagers with different lives and personalities attend a prominent private school with only one thing in common: their vocation and passion for music.

programme.title: Capítulo 189
programme.desc: Cachi, the party planner, tells Franco and Alma they have to finish the details themselves. Gandia takes Madariaga's role as Academic Coordinator away. Giovanni, Vico, and Tomás meet Debora. Mía confronts Celina about the invite and letter to Lupita. Miguel finds out that Gastón is in Monterrey; he threatens Mía about it. Lupita is determined to go to Guadalajara. Simon tells Roberta he'll do advertising for a RBD concert. Mía goes to Miguel for help with Celina.

programme.title: Capítulo 190
programme.desc: Miguel apologizes to Mía and agrees to help her with Celina. Celina accuses Mía of betrayal and tells Miguel that Mía still loves him. Roberta gives the guys a list of ingredients to make a concoction to rid the curse of Debora. Renata goes to Madariaga's house to prevent him from leaving the school; she tells a neighbor she's his girlfriend. Celina apologizes to Lupita for the letter. Gastón visits Miguel's mother, Elena. Miguel confronts Mía about what Celina revealed; they both deny their feelings. Teo confronts the visitor for José. Simon announces he's covered the city with RBD posters.

programme.title: Capítulo 191
programme.desc: Diego tries to prevent his dad from seeing the RBD posters. Renata tells Madariaga that leaving Elite Way will destroy the kids. José gets a gift from her tutor. Mía insults Vico's and Lupita's dresses; however, she has two dresses designed for Vico and Lupita. Miguel finds out Gastón visited his mother. Roberta decides to steal and bury Mía's dress in revenge for Lupita. Mía asks Alma to ask Franco to not let Valeria at the party. Gastón tells Mía he won't be at the party.

programme.title: Cartas a la bruja
programme.desc: A Mexican television series that centers on the López household.

programme.title: Esperando a Don Justo
programme.desc: A Mexican television series that centers on the López household.

programme.title: Se busca
programme.desc: El Chino consigue trabajo probando videojuegos y provoca que Albertano busque el empleo de sus sueños. María decide buscar novio por internet y, durante una de sus citas a ciegas, el chico la cambia por Betzabé.

programme.title: Celos a domicilio
programme.desc: María busca darle celos a Albertano y contrata a un hombre guapo por catálogo para hacerlo. Albertano muere de celos y le confiesa al Chino que la quiere, éste le aconseja que la vuelva a enamorar.

programme.title: La boda imposible
programme.desc: Albertano le confiesa a Lucha que está enamorado de María y quiere casarse con ella. María debe decidir si quedarse con Albertano o iniciar una vida al lado de un nuevo amor.

programme.title: El sueño angélico
programme.desc: María de todos los Ángeles es una tierna chica cansada de dar la prueba de amor por todos lados, no pierde la esperanza de encontrar al hombre de su vida. Una noche por revelación divina, sus ángeles de la guarda le anuncian la llegada de su ser amado, pero tendrá que realizar una serie de peripecias al seguir una las señales para que esto ocurra. Mientras tanto su vecina Doña Lucha con quien no tiene buena relacion y que es madre de El Chino y Rosa Aurora, recibe la llegada de su hijo consentido Albertano quien se había ausentado para probar suerte en Estados Unidos. Albertano decide vivir solo en el cuarto de azotea ya que siente que el viaje lo ha hecho un hombre maduro e independiente, claro mientras que su madre le lave, le planche, le suba el desayuno y le prenda el boiler. María no encuentra las señales, pero en la noche mientras tiende tristemente su ropa en la azotea, descubre a Albertano quien le ayuda caballerosamente a tender sus sabanas, María ve en ello la señal que había estado esperando.

programme.title: El perro de los focos
programme.desc: María sueña que los ángeles le dicen que solo mirando directamente a los ojos de Albertano sabrá si éste es ó no el amor de su vida, así que decide provocar un nuevo encuentro con él. Don Carmelo percibe un fuerte olor a gas y le pide a María que suba a buscar la fuga a la azotea, esto provoca el romántico encuentro en el patio trasero, donde María a toda costa trata de descubrir si Albertano es su alma gemela. Rosa Aurora decide subir a encontrar la fuga. y se encuentra con María su antagónica, discuten ya que el olor a gas es provocado por una fuga proveniente del boiler de Doña Lucha, esta arma un argüende al tratar de arreglar el desperfecto y provoca una explosión, María de todos los Ángeles recuerda que Albertano se ha quedado dormido en el cuarto de la azotea y heroicamente salva la vida de Albertano arriesgando la suya, sin embargo su felicidad se ve nublada al descubrir que Albertano es hijo de su enemiga Doña Lucha.

programme.title: Los chiles de la discordia
programme.desc: María sueña que los ángeles le dicen que para poder llegar al corazón de Albertano debe ganarse con humildad el corazón de su madre Doña Lucha, el sueño es interrumpido por el barullo del tianguis de los martes al que María acude cada semana a comerse un tlacoyo de masa azul. Albertano quien acompaña a su madre al tianguis se separa para ver los peces de un acuario y se encuentran con María, éste le agradece amablemente el haberle salvado la vida en el incidente de la fuga de gas y en un intercambio de halagos y agradecimiento Albertano sin darse cuenta invita María a comer , lo cual la pone feliz ya que ve en ello la oportunidad de ganarse a la familia de Albertano y trabajar su humildad. En el almacén de Don Carmelo deciden cambiar los candados por un sistema de seguridad muy sofisticado y con una tecnología que rebasa a Carmelito, quien por equivocación acciona el sistema de seguridad quedándose junto con Betsabé y Defino encerrados en la bodega. María llega a casa de Doña Lucha con un gran plato de chiles en nogada muy bien decorados, esto despierta un sentimiento de competencia en Doña Lucha, quien hará un esfuerzo por contener el enojo, ya que María tratando de quedar bien se mete hasta la cocina, desatándose una batalla campal durante la comida.

programme.title: Serymar Soto
programme.desc: "The series, hosted by Univision news anchor Ilia Calderón, revisits harrowing cases that shocked the public. Through the accounts of victims' families, expert analysis, and journalists, the show unravels the contributing factors and warning signs that ultimately led to each tragic event. With access to personal images, videos, and locations related to the victims and their perpetrators, viewers are taken on a journey into the heart-wrenching stories."

programme.title: Acapulco en la azotea
programme.desc: Don Hipólito recibe un filtro de agua, pero Germán termina arruinando la instalación. Además, Magdalena se va de vacaciones, pero su destino no es tan lujoso como dice.

programme.title: Cena en París
programme.desc: Hipólito se reencuentra con un viejo amor y deciden cumplir la promesa que se hicieron hace muchos años. Frankie le cuenta sus historias de vida al Calaco.

programme.title: La peli de Frankie
programme.desc: Frankie searches among his neighbors for inspiration for the characters in his new movie. Additionally, Roco and Alejandra find out that Morris won a scholarship.

programme.title: La jubilación de Arturo y Chabelo
programme.desc: Arturo le cuenta a su familia que por fin podrá jubilarse y tendrán un dinero extra. Mientras tanto, los demás vecinos se reúnen para ver En familia con Chabelo.

programme.title: La estética de Lorena
programme.desc: Lorena tiene dificultades económicas y por eso decide abrir una estética que termina arruinando el cabello de sus clientes.

programme.title: Diva en el edificio
programme.desc: Los vecinos compiten en una trivia de televisión para que Lucía Méndez pase una tarde con ellos. Además, Silvia y Luis descubren que posiblemente esperen otro hijo.

programme.title: El sueño de Rocko
programme.desc: Rocko sueña con tener un grupo de rock llamado Los Moridos y empieza reunir a otros integrantes. Mientras, Jorjais decide mejorar su carrito para incrementar sus propinas.

programme.title: Basura en la escalera
programme.desc: Uno de los vecinos deja su basura en las escaleras, por lo que Luisito quiere encontrar al culpable. Además, Silvia hace de todo para ayudar a su sobrina a buscar empleo.

programme.title: La reina del Pik Pok
programme.desc: Erika Buenfil acude a la colonia para encontrar a nuevos talentos, pero termina conociendo a los vecinos. Además, don Hipólito tiene un nuevo trabajo para Germán.

programme.title: Cumpleaños de Luisito Junior
programme.desc: Es el cumpleaños de Luisito Jr. y Silvia se dispone a realizar una fiesta en privado. Sin embargo, los vecinos descubren el festejo y arman una celebración en grande.

programme.title: Bonita familia
programme.desc: Pedro pierde a Rambo en el póker con El Pechugo y Cris intenta recuperarlo. La familia Rivers recibe una mala noticia que tiene que ver con Don Lorenzo.

programme.title: Elote el guajolote
programme.desc: Vanesa recibe la visita de un inspector de seguridad en su clínica para cerciorarse de que todo esté en orden. Además, los vecinos aconsejan a Germán para conquistar a Virginia.

programme.title: Nos cayeron los chahuiztles
programme.desc: Casimiro Pérez, el hermano de Magda llega de visita. Además, la madrastra de Lorena le trae una noticia que cambiará su situación económica.

programme.title: Adopción
programme.desc: Cris shows Pedro the adoption application but they will receive a visit from the social worker. Germán, on the other hand, will be pruning the trees outside the building, without imagining the problems that this would bring.

programme.title: Buzón de quejas
programme.desc: Los problemas en el edificio revivieron un buzón de quejas que ya estaba olvidado, pero este buzón traerá problemas a Luis y Silvia. Por otro lado Morris esta a punto de reprobar el año.

programme.title: Can guash
programme.desc: Pedro se aterra por la llegada de su suegro pues tiene miedo de que no se lleven bien, además Germán y Vanessa emprenden un nuevo negocio.

programme.title: Oficinas de gobierno
programme.desc: Los vecinos aprovechan la apertura de unas nuevas oficinas de gobierno para emprender sus negocios y obtener algo de dinero, pero cuando Luis los descubre, intentará correrlos de la entrada del edificio.

programme.title: Llegada de Martina
programme.desc: Cris y Pablo están esperando a su hija Martina y, nerviosos por conocerla, preparan todo para recibirla. Por otro lado, Liz y Vanesa abren su tienda de ropa virtual y logran hacer un trato con Don Arturo.

programme.title: El gorrión de la canción
programme.desc: Dulce arrives at the building looking for the author of some songs to compose a new single for her. Also, Luis and Silvia meet the parents of one of their son's classmates.

programme.title: Sortilegio
programme.desc: Alejandro returns home after a terrible accident to discover that he is married to Maria Jose, a poor, innocent girl who was deceived by Alejandro's brother Bruno. Bruno used Alejandro's name to marry Maria Jose, soon after he sent to kill his brother in hopes that Maria Jose would inherit Alejandro's fortune. But when Maria Jose arrives at the mansion she realizes that Bruno lied to her and used her. She is also scared when Alejandro is found alive and returns home. Doctors tell Alejandro that he suffers from memory loss but he is convinced he never met Maria Jose before and goes in search of the truth, but during this time and Maria Jose actually fall in love, while Bruno and Maura (Alejandro's ex-girlfriend) plot to break them up. Meanwhile, the brothers' mother Victoria has fallen in love with Fernando--Alejandro's best friend, so closer to his age than hers.

programme.title: Capítulo 183
programme.desc: Giovanni openly accepts his parents and his love for Vico in front of the entire school. Roberta wrecks on Simon's motorcycle. Miguel decides to finish with his revenge then return to Monterrey. Franco gets injured and Alma leaves him by himself. Mía has dance rehearsals; Gastón gets angry when she dances with Miguel. Tomás decides to stay with Pilar to get good grades. Gastón punishes Miguel.

programme.title: Rebelde
programme.desc: Six teenagers with different lives and personalities attend a prominent private school with only one thing in common: their vocation and passion for music.

programme.title: Capítulo 185
programme.desc: Gastón punishes the students. Roberta devises a long con to get revenge on Diego. Valeria throws a fit when she learns that Mía will get her party; Franco admonishes her. Mía promises Gastón she'll stay away from Miguel. Franco begs Miguel for help with protecting Mía. Lupita tells Galia who stole the tests. Gandia withdraws his helping hand to Tomás. Gastón begins an investigation into Miguel. Pilar attacks Lupita.

programme.title: Capítulo 186
programme.desc: Valeria accuses Alma of trying to take Franco. Celina teams up with Pilar to get revenge on Lupita. Simon snaps an unflattering picture of Diego, Giovanni, and Tomás; copies are made anonymously. Celina scratches out Lupita's name on Mía's guest list. Miguel follows Gastón to a bank where he exits handcuffed to a briefcase. Roberta beats up Pilar to defend Lupita and blames her for the photo. Miguel and Mía partner up in class; he tells her to ask Gastón about his morning.

programme.title: Capítulo 187
programme.desc: Mía asks Gastón where he went, he tells her but then reveals he has a plan to get rid of Miguel. Mendiola congratulates Gandia then suspends Pilar for a week. Pilar tells Celina they have to make Lupita leave. Simon and Diego fight. Miguel updates Franco in return he put him in charge of Mía's party details. Lupita catches Celina vomiting. Gastón continues his investigation into Miguel. When Diego finds out Roberta is dating Simon, he tells her he loves her and kisses her. Madariaga continues to push Hilda and Hilario together. Gastón decides to leave for "Monterrey. Mía finds the letter to Lupita.

programme.title: Rebelde
programme.desc: Six teenagers with different lives and personalities attend a prominent private school with only one thing in common: their vocation and passion for music.

programme.title: Capítulo 189
programme.desc: Cachi, the party planner, tells Franco and Alma they have to finish the details themselves. Gandia takes Madariaga's role as Academic Coordinator away. Giovanni, Vico, and Tomás meet Debora. Mía confronts Celina about the invite and letter to Lupita. Miguel finds out that Gastón is in Monterrey; he threatens Mía about it. Lupita is determined to go to Guadalajara. Simon tells Roberta he'll do advertising for a RBD concert. Mía goes to Miguel for help with Celina.

programme.title: Capítulo 190
programme.desc: Miguel apologizes to Mía and agrees to help her with Celina. Celina accuses Mía of betrayal and tells Miguel that Mía still loves him. Roberta gives the guys a list of ingredients to make a concoction to rid the curse of Debora. Renata goes to Madariaga's house to prevent him from leaving the school; she tells a neighbor she's his girlfriend. Celina apologizes to Lupita for the letter. Gastón visits Miguel's mother, Elena. Miguel confronts Mía about what Celina revealed; they both deny their feelings. Teo confronts the visitor for José. Simon announces he's covered the city with RBD posters.

programme.title: Capítulo 191
programme.desc: Diego tries to prevent his dad from seeing the RBD posters. Renata tells Madariaga that leaving Elite Way will destroy the kids. José gets a gift from her tutor. Mía insults Vico's and Lupita's dresses; however, she has two dresses designed for Vico and Lupita. Miguel finds out Gastón visited his mother. Roberta decides to steal and bury Mía's dress in revenge for Lupita. Mía asks Alma to ask Franco to not let Valeria at the party. Gastón tells Mía he won't be at the party.

programme.title: Futura relación
programme.desc: Arriaga visita a opalina. Ella le dice q está comenzado a amar y va a tener un hijo. Paula es la nueva profesora de piano de Niki. Leo quiere sacar a Beatriz de la oficina. Niki visita a Kendra en lugar de una psicóloga.

programme.title: Season 1

programme.title: Consejos de amiga
programme.desc: Niki le pide a su papá q deje su amante. Aníbal visita a Paula y le cuenta la verdad sobré Adriana. Victoria va a una estética con sus amigas y hacen confidencias. Jocelyn quiere q Victoria le preste Arriaga.

programme.title: Citas de guardaespaldas
programme.desc: Niki conoce a Paula y Guzmán le pide q la corra. Ella lo hace pero Paula se niega a renunciar. Niki le pide perdón a su mamá. Guzmán le revela a Niki su secreto. Jacelyn se quiere aprovechar de Arriaga. Victoria los espía.

programme.title: Psicóloga descubierta
programme.desc: Santino visita Beatriz y quiere ayudarla. Victoria destruye la pintura de Arriaga. Guillo muy grosero con su mamá. Guzmán enfrenta a Paula. Guzman descubre a Niki
